creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Girgen,

sorry, I was pointing you to the wrong place ...

The issue should be found in
 file: ${LOCALBASE}/share/apr/build-1/libtool

See discussion:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-apache/2011-April/002193.html

Anyway it will be interesting to find out why the solution in devel/apr1
doesn't work(ed) on your system.

--
Regards,
olli
